biological_replicate: A C57BL/6 mouse line with a point mutation (S33A) in the mouse Hsd17b13 locus (Hsd17B1333A/A mice) was generated by CRISPR/Cas9-mediated genome engineering.
experimental_design: To determine the functional relevance of the phosphorylation of 17β-HSD13 at Ser33 in mice, a C57BL/6 mouse line with a point mutation (S33A) in the mouse Hsd17b13 locus (Hsd17B1333A/A mice) was generated by CRISPR/Cas9-mediated genome engineering.
factor_value: The mRNA and protein levels of endogenous hepatic 17β-HSD13 were similar between Hsd17b1333A/A mice and the littermate WT controls (Hsd17b13+/+).
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: Hsd17B1333A/A mice and the littermate WT controls (Hsd17b13+/+).
number_of_samples: The study involves two genotypes: Hsd17B1333A/A mice and Hsd17b13+/+ mice.
